tile.description: Monitor Linux kernel Pressure Stall Information (PSI) - per-resource CPU, memory, and I/O contention pressure.
tile.title: Linux PSI

media.caption: Status overview at a glance - four KPI tiles with red/yellow/green conditional formatting answer 'is anything wedging my hosts right now?' in under five seconds
Fleet view - top hosts by CPU / memory / I/O pressure plus the cumulative stall-time leaderboard showing which hosts ate the most real stall over the window
Per-host investigation - some-vs-full overlays per resource plus stall-rate-per-second derived from the total counter; uses the host template variable to drill into one machine
Per-cgroup view - the noisy-neighbor finder. Top cgroups by CPU and memory pressure across systemd services and k8s pods (requires cgroup_roots config)
Capacity and trends - this week vs same time last week for CPU and memory, plus the pressure budget leaderboard ranking hosts by their composite-score pressure consumption
Reference inventory - all three averaging windows (avg10/avg60/avg300) per resource for custom-query authoring, with Datadog's anomaly detection overlay
